TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kzyay Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Kzyay a niyaro', 141 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 355 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 12% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 42 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 88% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 313 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 11%, Seediq 1%.
S.PHON: k*jaj itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŇč ¶…ôn no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u k*jaj a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi* *%.
S.FORM: Kzyay Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Kzyay a niyaro', 141 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 355 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 12% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 42 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 88% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 313 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 11%, Seediq 1%.
S.PHON: k*jaj itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŇč ¶…ôn no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u k*jaj a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi* *%.
